mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.devicename AS export_devicename, d.datatablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dt.id IN (3,7,9) AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0 AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.devicename AS export_devicename, d.datatablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dt.id = 1 AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id WHERE dt.id IN(4,6) AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0

SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.view_tablename, d.id_site, d.id_device_type FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON d.id_device_type = dt.id WHERE dt.id IN(1,4,6) AND SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0
mapper.sql:
( LAG(MAX(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NULL OR (
MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFMONTH(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value))) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
DAYOFYEAR(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value))) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
) )

( LEAD(MIN(time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) IS NOT NULL AND
= AND MINUTE(FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' )) = 0
= AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFMONTH(LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
= AND DAYOFYEAR(LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time)) = 1 AND FROM_UNIXTIME(( UNIX_TIMESTAMP( LEAD(MIN(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)), 1) OVER (ORDER BY time) ) DIV 900 )* 900, '%H:%i:%s' ) = '00:00:00'
1
)
mapper.select:
SELECT t.categories_time, t.hour_time, ROUND(
, 1) AS energy, ROUND(AVG(IF(t.id_device_type IN (4,6), t.`value`, NULL)), 1) AS irradiance FROM (
SELECT AS time_format, AS categories_time, AS hour_time, s.dc_capacity, s.interval_energy_threshold, s.minimum_energy_value, d.id, d.id_device_type, CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) AS time,
m.`value`
AS `value`, m.sumEnergy FROM ${item.datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN ( SELECT AS currentTimeValid, AS leadTimeValid, MIN(dv.time) AS minTime, MAX(dv.time) AS maxTime, LAG(MAX(dv.time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY dv.time) AS lagMaxTime,
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance)
NULL
AS `value`, SUM(IF(m.sumEnergy >= s.minimum_energy_value AND m.sumEnergy <= s.dc_capacity * (1 + (s.interval_energy_threshold / 100)) * (CASE s.data_send_time WHEN 3 THEN 1 / 60 WHEN 1 THEN 1 / 12 WHEN 2 THEN 1 / 4 ELSE 1 END), m.sumEnergy, NULL)) AS sumEnergy FROM ${item.datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN ( SELECT time AS time_full,
NULL
LEAD(dv.nvmActiveEnergy, 1) OVER (ORDER BY dv.time) - dv.nvmActiveEnergy
AS sumEnergy FROM ${item.datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE SHA1(s.id) = #{hash_id} AND s.`status` = 1 AND d.id = #{item.id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND dv.nvmActiveEnergy IS NOT NULL ) m ON m.time_full = dv.time GROUP BY
) m ON m.minTime = dv.time AND dv.id_device = #{item.id}
) t GROUP BY t.time_format

SELECT time_format, categories_time, hour_time, id_device, CAST(
t.`value`
AS DECIMAL ) AS energy FROM ( SELECT s.dc_capacity, s.interval_energy_threshold, s.minimum_energy_value, CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value) AS time, AS time_format, AS categories_time, AS hour_time, dv.id_device,
m.`value`
AS `value`, m.sumEnergy FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN ( SELECT AS currentTimeValid, AS leadTimeValid, MIN(dv.time) AS minTime, MAX(dv.time) AS maxTime, LAG(MAX(dv.time), 1) OVER (ORDER BY dv.time) AS lagMaxTime,
AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance)
AVG(dv.nvmActivePower)
NULL
AS `value`, SUM(IF(m.sumEnergy >= s.minimum_energy_value AND m.sumEnergy <= s.dc_capacity * (1 + (s.interval_energy_threshold / 100)) * (CASE s.data_send_time WHEN 3 THEN 1 / 60 WHEN 1 THEN 1 / 12 WHEN 2 THEN 1 / 4 ELSE 1 END), m.sumEnergy, NULL)) AS sumEnergy FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN ( SELECT time AS time_full,
NULL
LEAD(dv.nvmActiveEnergy, 1) OVER (ORDER BY dv.time) - dv.nvmActiveEnergy
AS sumEnergy FROM ${datatablename} dv JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.`status` = 1 AND d.id = #{id} AND d.`status` = 1 AND dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{start_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(#{end_date}, t.value, 'UTC') AND dv.nvmActiveEnergy IS NOT NULL ) m ON m.time_full = dv.time GROUP BY
) m ON m.minTime = dv.time AND dv.id_device = #{id} ) t

SELECT
hour_time,
categories_time, CAST(SUM(nvmActiveEnergy) AS DECIMAL) AS energy, ROUND(AVG(nvm_irradiance), 1) AS irradiance FROM ( SELECT
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%m/%d/%Y %H:00' ) AS categories_time, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%H:00' ) AS hour_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%m/%d' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%b-%Y' ) AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ), '%Y' ) AS categories_time,
SUM(dv.nvmActiveEnergy) AS nvmActiveEnergy, AVG(dv.nvm_irradiance) AS nvm_irradiance FROM ${table_data_virtual} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.id = #{id} AND d.id_device_type = 12 AND (CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.`value` ) BETWEEN #{start_date} AND #{end_date}) AND s.`status` = 1 AND d.`status` = 1 GROUP BY time_format ) t GROUP BY categories_time
SELECT SHA1(id) as hash_id, id FROM site WHERE id_company = #{id_company} AND is_delete = 0 AND `status` = 1 AND kiosk_view = 1 ORDER BY `name`, id_company ASC;
SELECT id_company FROM site WHERE SHA1(id) = #{hash_id}
